### 📝 Description

### 👤 User Story
---
<!-- Write the story in the format: As a [role], I want [goal], so that [benefit]. For example: As a user, I want to update my profile information, so that my account reflects my current preferences. -->



### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
---
<!-- List the concrete conditions that must be met for this story to be complete. -->
- [ ] API service can be started with `poetry run uvicorn src.cezzis_com_cloudsync_api.main:app --reload` and becomes healthy
- [ ] Service is accessible on documented ports (default: 8015)
- [ ] Configuration and usage are documented in README
- [ ] API endpoints or authentication examples are provided



### 💡 Implementation Notes
<!-- Optional: add design references, constraints, or testing considerations. Reference account features, OAuth integration, or profile management. -->
